indexName: BSE Select IPO Total Return Index

holdings.name: Zomato
holdings.description: Listed 2021. BSE Select IPO largest weight. Profitability milestone achieved. Blinkit quick-commerce expanding nationally.

holdings.name: LIC of India
holdings.description: Listed 2022. India's largest insurer. IPO raised Rs 21,000 Cr — India's largest IPO. Government retains 96%+ stake.

holdings.name: Mankind Pharma
holdings.description: Listed 2023. Branded generics across India. Pan-India distribution with 50,000+ outlets. Consumer healthcare brands — Prega News, AcneStar.

holdings.name: PB Fintech
holdings.description: Listed 2021. Policybazaar and Paisabazaar platforms. Profitability achieved. India's largest online insurance aggregator.

holdings.name: Nykaa
holdings.description: Listed 2021. India's largest beauty and personal care platform. House of brands — Kay Beauty, Nykd. Omnichannel physical + digital.

holdings.name: JSW Infrastructure
holdings.description: Listed 2023. India's second-largest private port operator. Mangalore, Goa and Paradip ports. Leveraging JSW Steel captive volumes.

holdings.name: Honasa Consumer
holdings.description: Listed 2023. Mamaearth, The Derma Co, Aqualogica brands. Direct-to-consumer personal care with digital marketing capabilities.

holdings.name: SBFC Finance
holdings.description: Listed 2023. MSME-focused secured lender. Small business loans with gold loan component. Growing rural and semi-urban credit book.

holdings.name: Godigit Insurance
holdings.description: Listed 2024. India's fastest growing general insurer. Digital-first motor and health insurance platform.

holdings.name: Ola Electric
holdings.description: Listed 2024. India's largest EV scooter maker. S1 platform with Ola Gig B2B electric scooter for delivery partners.
